name: changmen
description: A8 esports aggregator — frontend replica + local backend

scripts.check:venue-adapter: npm run check:exports --workspace=@changmen/venue-adapter && npm run check:internal-imports --workspace=@changmen/venue-adapter && npm run check:web-imports --workspace=@changmen/venue-adapter && npm run check:esport-freeze --workspace=@changmen/venue-adapter
scripts.check:client-core: npm run check:exports --workspace=@changmen/client-core && npm run check:internal-imports --workspace=@changmen/client-core && npm run check:consumer-imports --workspace=@changmen/client-core
scripts.test: npm run check:boundaries && npm run check:venue-adapter && npm run check:client-core && npm run test:api-contract && npm run test:catalog-smoke && turbo run test
scripts.test:catalog-smoke: node --experimental-strip-types packages/shared/catalog/market_catalog_smoke.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types packages/shared/catalog/game_catalog_smoke.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types packages/shared/catalog/sport_catalog_smoke.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types packages/shared/im_parse_smoke.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types packages/shared/time/match_time_smoke.test.ts && node server/storage/paths_smoke.test.mjs && node server/backend/core/esport-api/sport_list_cache.smoke.test.mjs && node server/backend/core/esport-api/sport_predictfun_fetch.smoke.test.mjs && node server/backend/core/esport-api/sport_venue_ingest.smoke.test.mjs && node server/backend/core/esport-api/sport_merge.smoke.test.mjs && node server/team-resolver/sport_team_plugin.smoke.test.mjs && node server/db/sport_matcher_tables.smoke.test.mjs && vitest run server/db/order_link_filter.test.mjs server/db/order_changmen_bet.test.mjs
